

# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, no api changes)
- [ ] Test updates
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

### Security
- [ ] I have verified that my changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have followed secure coding practices
- [ ] I have validated all inputs and outputs
- [ ] I have considered data protection and privacy implications

### Accessibility
- [ ] I have tested keyboard navigation
- [ ] I have verified screen reader compatibility
- [ ] I have checked color contrast ratios
- [ ] I have ensured proper ARIA labels are used

### Performance
- [ ] I have tested performance impact
- [ ] I have optimized database queries if applicable
- [ ] I have considered caching strategies
- [ ] Lighthouse score meets project standards

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Test coverage meets project requirements (≥70%)
- [ ] All tests pass in CI pipeline

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated if needed
- [ ] API documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Architecture diagrams updated if needed
- [ ] Changelog updated if needed

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Please attach screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your changes.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the pull request here.

## Reviewers

Please tag relevant reviewers:
- @team/backend for API changes
- @team/frontend for UI changes
- @team/devops for infrastructure changes
- @team/security for security-related changes

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] Database migrations required
- [ ] Environment variables need to be updated
- [ ] Third-party services need to be configured
- [ ] Breaking changes require communication plan

## Related Issues

- Closes # 
- Related to #
- Blocked by #
